title: ChangeGate Evaluation Event v1
description: Sink-agnostic product event envelope for ChangeGate merge-eligibility decisions and their real-world outcomes (JSONL, SQLite, or remote sinks). Digest-and-reference only: this schema deliberately defines NO fields for raw prompts, source file contents, secrets, credentials, or entire command output, and none may be added within v1. Defined by docs/strategy/CHANGEGATE_VERTICAL_MVP_SLICE_1_POLICY_SPEC.md §19. Status: DRAFT_FOR_OWNER_REVIEW; no production emitter exists yet.

event_id.description: Globally unique event identifier (generated by the emitting application layer, never by the pure evaluator).

event_type.description: Closed v1 event vocabulary linking evaluation to user/reviewer action, merge/CI outcome, rollback/rework, and feedback.

occurred_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp supplied by the emitting layer.

schema_version.description: Fixed envelope version. Any envelope change requires a new versioned schema file.

product.description: Emitting product. ChangeGate events never masquerade as another product's events.

project_ref.description: Opaque project reference, when a project context exists.

task_ref.description: Task identifier the event concerns (same grammar as TaskContract.task_id).

run_ref.description: Evidence run identifier, when the event is bound to a specific run.

subject_ref.description: Domain-neutral subject reference shaped after ADR-003 §8 SubjectRef. This is a JSON reference shape only; it does not implement or preempt the future kernel SubjectRef model.

context_digest.description: Canonical sha256 digest of the evaluation context (input digest for evaluation events).

policy_version.description: Policy version or digest under which the referenced decision was made.

evaluator_version.description: Evaluator software version that produced the referenced decision.

decision_ref.description: Reference to the merge-eligibility decision this event is about. Referencing only: an event can never author or amend a decision.

evidence_refs.description: Evidence involved, by identifier and digest only — never evidence content.

outcome.description: Observed real-world result for merge/CI/rollback event types.

feedback.description: Human feedback about a decision. Feedback is a recorded signal, never ground truth, and never mutates the active policy (spec §20).

comment_digest.description: Digest of any free-text comment; the raw comment is stored, redacted, outside this envelope.

provenance.description: Who emitted this event and from which trace context.

privacy_classification.description: Mandatory privacy class; sinks must refuse an event without one (spec §21).
